user_message: Just came out of consumption trend with Fourth Coffee. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Fourth Coffee: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

handoffs.condition: record fixes needed for accurate gap

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF27-J trap (Claims 'on track' when masking a category gap); produces complete Gap decomposition (coverage, conversion, value, timing), recovery options with probability estimates
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF27-J failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF27-J failure mode (Claims 'on track' when masking a category gap)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF27-J -- Claims 'on track' when masking a category gap
